title: Rithvik Credits Net Game for Recent Success, Aims for Top 50
indian_angle: Young Indian shuttler Rithvik discusses his recent title win and future aspirations, providing insight into his development.
summary: Young Indian shuttler Rithvik, fresh from winning the Valence Alpes International title, attributes his success to an improved net game and aims to break into the world's top 50.

title: BAI Implements 3x15 Scoring for Junior Domestic Tournaments
indian_angle: This new scoring system will directly impact young Indian badminton players in domestic ranking tournaments and national championships.
summary: Badminton Association of India has announced the implementation of a 3x15 scoring system for U-13, U-15, and U-17 domestic ranking tournaments and national championships.

title: Kidambi Srikanth Finishes Runner-Up at US Open
indian_angle: Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open, showcasing strong form despite a loss to Su Li Yang.
summary: Kidambi Srikanth's impressive run at the US Open concluded with a loss in the final to Su Li Yang, where he finished as the runner-up.

title: BAI Updates Selection Criteria for Asia Junior Championships
indian_angle: The updated criteria are crucial for aspiring young Indian shuttlers aiming to represent the country at the Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has issued a further addendum to the selection criteria for the upcoming Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships 2026.

title: Rounak Chouhan Upsets World No. 6 at US Open
indian_angle: Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan achieved a major upset by defeating World No. 6 Chou Tien Chen at the US Open.
summary: Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan, a self-proclaimed Cristiano Ronaldo fan, caused a stir at the US Open by defeating World No. 6 Chou Tien Chen.

title: BAI Warns Against Unauthorized Badminton Events
indian_angle: This advisory from BAI protects Indian players and ensures the integrity of badminton events across the country.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has issued an advisory warning players and stakeholders about participating in unauthorized badminton leagues, tournaments, and championships.
